name: Avigilon (Motorola Solutions) VMS & Access Control API
what_it_does: Avigilon Control Center (ACC) REST API and SDK for AI-powered video management and access control platform (Motorola Solutions subsidiary). Enables AI agents to manage camera feeds and AI-powered video analytics, handle access control door and reader management, retrieve appearance search and facial recognition data, access alarm and event management workflows, manage PTZ camera control, handle occupancy analytics and crowd detection, retrieve license plate recognition (LPR) data, access health monitoring and system diagnostics, manage user authentication and credential management, and integrate with Motorola Solutions broader public safety ecosystem.
use_cases: Managing AI video analytics and camera feeds from physical security automation agents
Handling access control and credential management from security operations agents
Retrieving appearance search and forensic investigation data from security investigation agents
Integrating VMS and access control with PSIM from enterprise security agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise AI video analytics needs
Pure cloud surveillance without on-premises or hybrid deployment
Low-budget security without Avigilon/Motorola enterprise pricing
best_when: An enterprise, critical infrastructure, or public safety organization using Avigilon ACC wants AI agents to automate security monitoring, AI video analytics, access control management, forensic investigation, and integration with Motorola Solutions public safety systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Facial recognition and appearance search are subject to strict legal restrictions in many jurisdictions (Illinois BIPA, EU AI Act, various city bans). Automated license plate reading requires compliance with local laws. AI video analytics for behavior prediction requires extensive legal review and bias auditing.

auth.notes: Avigilon uses OAuth 2.0 and API keys for ACC REST API. SDK uses certificate authentication. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for alarm and event notifications. Motorola Solutions subsidiary with integration to CommandCentral and PremierOne CAD systems.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise camera and access control licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-camera licensing for ACC VMS; per-door for access control; AI analytics add-ons
pricing.notes: Vancouver, Canada (acquired by Motorola Solutions 2018 for $1B). Founded 2004. Premium AI-powered VMS with self-learning video analytics. Used by enterprises, casinos, transit, and critical infrastructure. Integration with Motorola Solutions public safety ecosystem. Competes with Milestone and Genetec for enterprise VMS.

performance.rate_limits: On-premises and hybrid VMS — rate limits depend on server configuration

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Facial recognition (Appearance Search) restricted or banned in many jurisdictions — BIPA, EU AI Act compliance required
LPR (license plate recognition) automation requires jurisdiction-specific legal review
No public MCP server — C#/Python SDK plus REST API with developer portal
On-premises/hybrid deployment — API availability depends on customer ACC server version
Motorola Solutions public safety integration — may require additional authorization for CAD/dispatch integrations
AI bias in video analytics — mandatory auditing for behavioral prediction use cases
agent_readiness.security_notes: Video surveillance, facial recognition, and access control data. GDPR, SOC2, FedRAMP, NDAA. OAuth2. On-premises/hybrid. Biometric data sensitivity and legal restrictions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Video surveillance and biometric data. GDPR, SOC2, FedRAMP. OAuth2. On-premises/hybrid. Facial recognition legal restrictions.
